licenseNote: This catalog contains project-authored template metadata, abstracted routing rules, and synthetic guidance. It does not include original third-party resume PDFs, screenshots, or raw personal resume text.

templates.label: Harvard General Resume
templates.description: 一页纸、证据优先、适合美国通用求职和 early-career。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 采用 0.5-0.75 inch 边距、单栏、标准标题和 1-2 行 bullet。
适合未指定强行业风格时的安全投递版。

templates.label: MIT Technical Resume
templates.description: 技术技能前置，项目和工程证据密度更高。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: Technical Skills 靠前，项目按系统、工具、规模、结果组织。
边距保持 0.55-0.75 inch，标题线清晰但不装饰。

templates.label: Google / Big Tech Resume
templates.description: 技术栈、系统规模、产品影响和 ATS 关键词优先。
templates.sourceLabel: Google Resume Signals + Big Tech Style
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 突出 scalable systems、algorithms、product impact 和 cross-functional evidence。
使用技术名词和指标，但不堆无证据关键词。

templates.label: Data / Analytics Resume
templates.description: SQL、Python、指标体系、看板、模型和业务决策清楚呈现。
templates.sourceLabel: Data Analyst / Data Science Knowledge Nodes
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 技能与项目靠前，bullet 按数据源、方法、指标和决策价值组织。
保留技术细节，同时让业务读者能快速扫描。

templates.label: Statistics / Quantitative CV
templates.description: 统计方法、模型验证、数据规模和解释价值优先。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 不把数学/统计项目硬写成商业话术，保留方法、假设和验证。
适合 quant、统计、应用数学、经济计量和研究申请。

templates.label: Wharton / Finance Resume
templates.description: 金融、投行、估值、风控和商科实习的紧凑版。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 更高信息密度，教育、GPA、课程、建模、交易/研究证据前置。
使用保守字体、短 bullet、右对齐日期习惯。

templates.label: Accounting / Audit Resume
templates.description: 审计、会计、税务和财务报告场景的稳重紧凑版。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 强调 reconciliation、working papers、controls、accuracy 和 compliance。
避免创意化排版，保持事务所和财务岗位可读性。

templates.label: FinTech Hybrid Resume
templates.description: 金融逻辑和技术实现同时呈现。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 技能分组采用技术简历方式，bullet 同时写 financial object 和 technical method。
适合金融科技、量化产品、风控数据和交易系统。

templates.label: MBB Consulting Resume
templates.description: 领导力、结构化分析、建议和业务影响突出。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 每条经历尽量体现问题、分析、建议、影响。
领导力和高质量商业判断优先于工具清单。

templates.label: Stanford Product / Leadership Resume
templates.description: 产品、增长、用户研究和跨部门推进更突出。
templates.sourceLabel: Stanford Resume Guide + Product Management Node
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 适度现代，但仍保持 ATS 结构。
强调用户问题、实验、roadmap、launch 和产品指标。

templates.label: Marketing / Media Editorial Resume
templates.description: 渠道、受众、内容、活动和作品证据清晰呈现。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 允许更强编辑层级，但主结构仍按 ATS。
bullet 必须写 audience、channel、campaign、reach 或 editorial value。

templates.label: Hospitality / Tourism Resume
templates.description: 服务流程、语言能力、活动规模和客户体验优先。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 视觉更友好但不花哨，适合服务、酒店、旅游和活动岗位。
强调 guest/customer、service recovery、event scale 和 languages。

templates.label: Law / Policy Formal CV
templates.description: 法律、政策、政府和合规方向的正式文本型模板。
templates.sourceLabel: Law and Legal Resume + Public Policy Corpus
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 保留 research、memo、brief、jurisdiction、stakeholder 等证据。
不强行套商业指标，格式正式、文字可读。

templates.label: Healthcare / Life Science CV
templates.description: 医学、公共卫生、实验室和生命科学方向。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 保留 protocol、sample、clinical/lab context、publication/presentation。
避免夸大临床责任，强调准确性和研究贡献。

templates.label: Oxford / UK CV
templates.description: 英国和欧洲申请更正式、教育与经历并重。
templates.sourceLabel: Oxford CV Sample + UK Academic/Professional CV Pattern
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 保留 UK CV 的正式标题、教育背景和经历顺序。
适合英国、欧洲、英联邦语境下的早期职业申请。

templates.label: Cambridge Academic CV
templates.description: 学术、研究、PhD 和奖学金申请模板。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 不压缩掉 Publications、Research、Teaching、Presentations。
页边距更宽，段落更正式，适合多页 CV。

templates.label: HKU / Hong Kong CV
templates.description: 香港地区投递，兼顾国际 CV 与中文地区求职习惯。
templates.sourceLabel: HKU / Hong Kong Career CV Guidance
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 香港作为国际与中文求职交叉场景，保留清晰教育、经历和语言能力。
避免过度美式或过度国内化。

templates.label: Startup / Modern Resume
templates.description: 创业公司、产品、运营和跨职能岗位的现代版。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 更强调 launch、ownership、experiments、growth 和 cross-functional。
有视觉记忆点，但保留单栏导出安全。

templates.label: USC Career Guide Resume
templates.description: 美国综合院校通用求职版，适合 early-career、实习和全职。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 强调清晰模块、倒序经历和一页纸可读性。
适合目标地区为美国但岗位风格不极端时使用。

templates.label: CMU SCS Software Resume
templates.description: 计算机、软件工程、系统项目和开源经历的高密度技术版。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
Technical Skills should be grouped by language, framework, infrastructure, and data tooling.
rationale: 技术技能前置，项目标题必须带清楚的技术对象。
适合 CS、SWE、系统、平台、后端和工程实习。

templates.label: CMU Tepper Business Resume
templates.description: 商学院、分析、运营和商业技术交叉方向。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 保留商科简历的紧凑度，同时强调数据和运营证据。
适合 business analytics、operations、strategy 和 MBA 申请。

templates.label: Berkeley Engineering Resume
templates.description: 工程、硬件、实验室、制造和系统实现导向。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 突出工程对象、工具链、测试/验证和性能结果。
比通用技术简历更重视硬件、实验、制造和可靠性。

templates.label: Yale Liberal Arts Resume

contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 不把文社科经历硬写成技术指标，保留研究、写作和组织能力。
适合政策、教育、非营利、传播和研究助理申请。

templates.label: Duke Business Resume

contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.

templates.label: NYU Stern Finance Resume
templates.description: 纽约金融、投研、估值、市场和商业分析场景。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.

templates.label: Tuck MBA Executive Resume
templates.description: MBA、管理、战略、商业影响和领导力版本。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.

templates.label: UVA Commerce Resume

contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 在商科证据和行业项目之间保持平衡。
适合 commerce、MIS、creative industries、consulting 和 business roles。

templates.label: Brown CareerLAB Resume
templates.description: 本科生、校园项目、研究、社团和早期职业通用版。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.

Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 允许校园经历和项目承担更多证明功能。
适合经历不多但需要完整一页纸的本科生。

templates.label: Dartmouth / Tuck Resume
templates.description: 精炼、传统、适合商科和泛行业投递。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 格式稳重，强调成就、领导力和职责范围。
适合商科、管理、咨询和金融交叉场景。

templates.label: WUSTL Business Resume
templates.description: 商学院、市场、金融、运营和管理方向。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 强调商业问题、分析动作和可解释结果。
适合 Olin 商学院风格的业务、咨询、市场和金融投递。

templates.label: Frontend / Product Engineer Resume
templates.description: 前端、全栈、产品工程、用户体验和性能优化。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
Frontend bullets should mention user-facing surface, framework, state/data flow, performance, accessibility, or release impact.
rationale: 强调 React/Vue、性能、可访问性、组件系统和产品效果。
避免只列页面开发，必须写用户面和工程面。

templates.label: Backend / Java Platform Resume
templates.description: 后端、Java、平台服务、数据库、缓存和接口性能。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
Backend bullets should include service boundary, API/data model, concurrency, reliability, latency, throughput, or deployment context when supported.
rationale: 把模块职责、接口、性能、稳定性和业务对象写清楚。
适合 Java 后端、平台工程、微服务和中间件方向。

templates.label: ML / AI Research Engineer Resume
templates.description: 机器学习、算法、大模型、实验指标和工程落地。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
ML bullets should preserve dataset, model, metric, baseline, experiment, deployment, or evaluation context where available.
rationale: 算法经历必须写数据、模型、指标、实验或上线，不写空泛 AI 词。
适合 ML engineer、AI engineer、算法、NLP、CV 和大模型方向。

templates.label: Cybersecurity / Infrastructure Resume
templates.description: 安全、云、网络、DevOps、基础设施和可靠性。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 强调 threat model、controls、automation、uptime、incident 和 compliance。
适合安全工程、云平台、SRE、DevOps 和网络方向。

templates.label: Embedded / Robotics Resume
templates.description: 嵌入式、机器人、控制、传感器和硬件软件协同。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.

contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
Do not force an academic CV into a one-page resume when publications, teaching, or research output require multi-page structure.
rationale: 允许多页 CV，保留出版物和学术产出。
适合 PhD、RA、奖学金、研究型岗位和学术申请。

templates.label: Law / LLM Formal CV
templates.description: 法律、LLM、合规、合同、案例研究和政策文本。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 强调 jurisdiction、legal research、memo、contract、brief 和 compliance。
避免商业化夸张，保留正式、准确和文本能力。

templates.label: Medicine / Clinical CV
templates.description: 医学、临床、科研、病例、实验室和公共卫生。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 严格区分观察、协助、研究和临床责任，避免越界表述。
适合医学、临床科研、公共卫生和生命科学申请。

templates.label: Environment / Sustainability Resume
templates.description: 环境、ESG、能源、气候、政策和可持续项目。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 用项目对象、数据、政策/研究方法和影响范围证明能力。
适合 ESG、能源、环境咨询、政策和可持续方向。

templates.label: Canada Co-op Resume
templates.description: 加拿大 co-op、实习、工程和商业岗位的清晰一页版。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 强调 co-op、项目、技能和岗位相关课程。
适合加拿大实习和新毕业生投递。

templates.label: Australia Professional Resume
templates.description: 澳洲求职语境，强调专业经历、技能概要和可验证成果。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 比美国一页纸更允许适度 profile，但仍保持简洁。
适合澳洲实习、graduate program 和 professional roles。

templates.label: Europe Professional CV
templates.description: 欧洲地区专业 CV，兼顾正式结构和岗位证据。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 根据欧洲语境保留更正式的 profile、语言能力和经历细节。
适合欧洲、英国以外欧盟市场和国际组织类投递。

templates.label: 中文校招标准版
templates.description: 国内校招、实习、应届生中文简历。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 个人信息、求职意向、教育、实习/项目、技能证书顺序清晰。
控制一页纸，弱化自我评价。

templates.label: 中文互联网大厂版
templates.description: 国内互联网、产品、运营、数据、技术岗。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 强调业务场景、项目落地、数据结果和岗位关键词。
不加照片为默认，除非用户场景要求。

templates.label: 中文产品/运营版
templates.description: 产品经理、用户运营、增长、内容运营和商业化岗位。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
产品/运营经历必须写清用户对象、需求/策略、执行动作、数据结果或复盘结论。
rationale: 把用户洞察、需求拆解、跨部门推进和上线/运营结果放到前台。
适合产品经理、内容运营、用户运营、增长和商业化。

templates.label: 中文数据分析版
templates.description: 数据分析、商业分析、BI、策略分析和经营分析。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
数据分析 bullet 优先保留数据源、工具、指标体系、分析方法、业务结论和落地动作。
rationale: 突出 SQL/Python、指标体系、看板、归因和业务建议。
避免把数据项目写成只会工具的课程作业。

templates.label: 中文技术岗简洁版
templates.description: 开发、测试、运维、算法和工程岗位的清晰技术版。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
技术技能分组展示；项目经历必须写模块、技术栈、实现方式、性能/效果或个人贡献边界。
rationale: 技术栈前置，项目按系统对象、个人模块、工程方法、结果组织。
适合互联网技术岗和校招技术筛选。

templates.label: 中文算法/AI版
templates.description: 算法工程师、机器学习、大模型、NLP、CV 和推荐岗位。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
算法项目必须保留数据集、模型、baseline、指标、实验结论或部署场景；没有指标时提出追问。
rationale: 把模型方法、实验指标、数据规模和工程落地分清楚。
不把所有 AI 经历写成同一种大模型套话。

templates.label: 中文 Java/后端版
templates.description: Java 后端、平台服务、微服务、数据库和中间件方向。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
后端项目必须写接口/服务边界、数据模型、缓存/消息队列、并发、稳定性或性能结果。
rationale: 比通用技术版更强调服务边界、接口、数据和稳定性。
适合 Java 后端、平台工程和微服务岗位。

templates.label: 中文前端/前端工程版
templates.description: 前端开发、全栈、低代码、可视化和用户界面工程。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
前端项目必须写用户界面对象、框架、状态/数据流、性能、组件复用或上线效果。
rationale: 突出 React/Vue、组件系统、性能优化、可视化和产品落地。
避免只写静态页面开发。

templates.label: 中文市场/品牌版
templates.description: 市场营销、品牌、公关、内容、活动和新媒体。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
市场类经历必须写渠道、受众、内容/活动动作、曝光/转化/线索等结果。
rationale: 让渠道、受众、传播动作和转化结果清楚可读。
适合市场、品牌、公关、新媒体和内容岗位。

templates.label: 中文咨询/商业分析版
templates.description: 咨询、战略、商业分析、行业研究和管培生。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
咨询类经历必须写问题拆解、研究方法、分析框架、建议输出和客户/业务影响。
rationale: 把经历改成问题、分析、建议、影响的结构。
适合咨询、战略、商业分析、管培生和行业研究。

templates.label: 中文银行金融版
templates.description: 国内银行、券商、投行、审计、金融机构。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 证书、金融课程、实习、报告、估值/审计对象更靠前。
版式稳重，可按场景展示证件照。

templates.label: 中文 HR/招聘版
templates.description: 人力资源、招聘、组织发展、员工关系和培训。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
HR 经历优先写招聘漏斗、培训项目、员工沟通、组织项目和合规边界。
rationale: 强调招聘流程、候选人/员工体验、培训和组织协同。
适合 HR、招聘、OD、培训和人力实习。

templates.label: 中文供应链/运营版
templates.description: 供应链、采购、物流、计划、仓储和运营管理。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
供应链经历必须写成本、周期、库存、交付、流程或供应商管理相关证据。
rationale: 用成本、周期、库存、交付和流程指标证明运营能力。
适合供应链、物流、采购、计划和运营管理。

templates.label: 中文教师/教育版
templates.description: 教师、教培、课程研发、教育运营和学校申请。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
教育类经历必须写授课对象、课程内容、班级/学生规模、教学结果或家校/运营协同。
rationale: 教育场景更重视证书、稳定性、教学对象和课程产出。
照片按教师/学校/事业单位场景自动判断。

templates.label: 中文国企/事业单位版
templates.description: 国企、央企、公务员、教师和事业单位。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
rationale: 教育、政治面貌/荣誉/证书/稳定性证据更重要。
照片和正式信息模块按国内场景判断。

templates.label: 中文高级商务版
templates.description: 社招、管理、商务、客户成功和成熟职业背景。
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
社招商务版允许短职业概览，但必须是证据摘要，不写空泛自我评价。
rationale: 适合有工作经验用户，把履历组织成业务成果和核心能力。
语气稳重，减少学生感和模板感。

templates.label: 香港中文/双语简历版
templates.description: 中国香港求职，结合港校 Career Guide、国际 CV 与中文求职习惯。
templates.sourceLabel: Hong Kong Career Guide + Chinese Resume Rules
contentRules: Every core experience should keep factual evidence from the original resume.
Each major experience or project should normally contain 2-4 role-relevant bullets.
Skills must be grouped and connected to evidence, not dumped as isolated keywords.
Do not include report commentary, references, scoring, or explanations in the resume body.
香港方向优先保留中英文语境、语言能力、港校/国际经历和正式清晰的模块结构。
rationale: 香港是中文与国际 CV 交叉场景，避免过度国内化或过度美式。
适合香港实习、银行、咨询、商科、科技和研究岗位。
